title: Indore、Madhya Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Indore、Madhya Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Indore是Madhya Pradesh的一個城市，人口約3,200,000。The cleanest city in India and a major commercial center in central India, known for its street food, textile industry, and educational institutions.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
